children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 18 months after , and on the dates that are 2 and 4 years thereafter, the Secretary shall issue a report to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate and the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives describing actions taken under this part.November 26, 2014

children.label: i
children.text: reviewed and the decision times for each request, measured from the date of the original request for an eligibility determination submitted by the sponsor;

children.label: ii
children.text: resulting in a determination that the nonprescription sunscreen active ingredient or combination of nonprescription sunscreen active ingredients is GRASE and is not misbranded;

children.label: iii
children.text: resulting in a determination that the nonprescription sunscreen active ingredient or combination of nonprescription sunscreen active ingredients is not GRASE and is misbranded and the reasons for such determinations; and

children.label: iv
children.text: for which a determination has not been made, and an explanation for the delay, a description of the current status of each such request, and the length of time each such request has been pending, measured from the date of original request for an eligibility determination by the sponsor;

children.label: i
children.text: reviewed and the decision times for each request;

children.label: ii
children.text: resulting in a determination that the nonprescription sunscreen active ingredient, combination of nonprescription sunscreen active ingredients, or other ingredient is GRASE and is not misbranded;

children.label: iii
children.text: resulting in a determination that the nonprescription sunscreen active ingredient, combination of nonprescription sunscreen active ingredients, or other ingredient is not GRASE and is misbranded and the reasons for such determinations; and

children.label: iv
children.text: for which a determination has not been made, and an explanation for the delay, a description of the current status of each such request, and the length of time each such request has been pending, measured from the date of original request for an eligibility determination by the sponsor;

children.label: C
children.text: an annual accounting (including information from years prior to , where such information is available) of the total number of requests submitted, pending, or completed under this part, including whether such requests were the subject of an advisory committee convened by the Secretary;November 26, 2014

children.label: D
children.text: a description of the staffing and resources relating to the costs associated with the review and decisionmaking pertaining to requests under this part;

children.label: E
children.text: a review of the progress made in meeting the deadlines with respect to processing requests under this part; and

children.label: F
children.text: to the extent the Secretary determines appropriate, recommendations for process improvements in the handling of requests under this part, including the advisory committee review process.

children.heading: Method
children.label: b Method
children.text: The Secretary shall publish the reports under subsection (a) in the manner the Secretary determines to be the most effective for efficiently disseminating the report, including publication of the report on the Internet website of the Food and Drug Administration.
